name: Moroccan Chicken Stew
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces canned tomatoes, quartered with juice
1 medium green pepper, sliced into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the oil into a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic, stirring until the onion is soft but not brown.
3. Stir in the turmeric, cinnamon, red pepper flakes, cloves, and bay leaves.
4. Add chicken and chicken stock; cook until liquid boils.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 25 minutes.
6. Add tomatoes, green pepper, carrots, and salt; cook another 10 minutes or until the chicken and vegetables are tender.
7. Spoon one-eighth of the couscous into each of eight soup plates.
8. Arrange chicken and vegetables around the couscous.
9. Ladle broth over all; sprinkle with raisins and almonds.
10. Serve.
